subcodes.first_line: O servant of His Holiness Riḍá, strive and endeavour thou to become a bondsman of Bahá. The light of His bounty in the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام حضرت رضا جهد و کوشش نما که غلام البهاء شوی نور بخشش آندلبر آفاق در
subcodes.subjects: @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love as fire, @love of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
